name: Turn It Around
short_description: Solve puzzles by turning the maze around. "Turn It Around" is a gravity-based puzzle game where you'll need to rotate the scene left or right to slide the balls to the goal. Navigate through increasingly challenging levels with a variety of evolving mechanics.
detailed_description:
Do you remember those wooden puzzles where you have to move a ball through a maze to reach the goal? Well, this game is based on a similar premise: to reach the goal, you have to rotate the stage.

Turn it Around is a gravity-based puzzle game where, in each level, you must solve a small labyrinth by rotating it left or right. As you progress, new mechanics will be introduced, refreshing the experience and gradually increasing the complexity.

The game features 45 different levels, each one more challenging than the last, until they become true tests of logic and skill that will keep you entertained for hours.

Solve all the intricate puzzles and help the balls return to their homeland, Bolaland!
